zh.lifeSummary: 當John FitzThomas FitzGerald 1st Baron Desmond於1195年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 利默里克沙尼德 卡素時，他的父親Thomas FitzMaurice Lord of Connello46歲，母親Ellinor de Marisco41歲。他於1235年之前與Margery FitzAnthony在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1268年7月23日在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼卡藍享年73歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 克里特拉利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John FitzThomas FitzGerald 1st Baron Desmond于1195年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 利默里克沙尼德 卡素时，他的父亲Thomas FitzMaurice Lord of Connello46岁，母亲Ellinor de Marisco41岁。他于1235年之前与Margery FitzAnthony在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1268年7月23日在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼卡藍享年73岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 克里特拉利。

nameMeanings.name: FitzGerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John FitzThomas FitzGerald 1st Baron Desmond was born in 1195, in Shanid Castle, County Limerick, Ireland, his father, Thomas FitzMaurice Lord of Connello, was 46 and his mother, Ellinor de Marisco, was 41. He married Margery FitzAnthony before 1235, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 23 July 1268, in Callan, County Kilkenny, Ireland, at the age of 73, and was buried in Tralee, County Kerry, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John FitzThomas FitzGerald 1st Baron Desmond est né en 1195, à Shanid Castle, County Limerick, Irlande, son père, Thomas FitzMaurice Lord of Connello, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Ellinor de Marisco, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Margery FitzAnthony avant 1235, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 23 juillet 1268, à Callan, County Kilkenny, Irlande, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Tralee, County Kerry, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als John FitzThomas FitzGerald 1st Baron Desmond 1195 in Shanid Castle, County Limerick, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas FitzMaurice Lord of Connello 46 und seine Mutter Ellinor de Marisco 41. Er hat vor 1235 in Irland Margery FitzAnthony geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 23. Juli 1268 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Callan, County Kilkenny, Irland und wurde in Tralee, County Kerry, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John FitzThomas FitzGerald 1st Baron Desmond è nato il nel 1195 nel Shanid Castle, County Limerick, Irlanda, il suo padre, Thomas FitzMaurice Lord of Connello, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Ellinor de Marisco, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Margery FitzAnthony prima del 1235, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 23 luglio 1268, nel Callan, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Tralee, County Kerry, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: John FitzThomas FitzGerald 1st Baron Desmondが1195年にアイルランドコウントイ リメリックシャニド カストルで生まれた時，父Thomas FitzMaurice Lord of Connelloは46歳，母Ellinor de Mariscoは41歳であった。1235年以前にアイルランドでMargery FitzAnthonyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1268年7月23日にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーカランで73歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ ケリートラリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John FitzThomas FitzGerald 1st Baron Desmond(이)가 1195년 아일랜드 카운티 라임릭 섀니드 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas FitzMaurice Lord of Connello(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellinor de Marisco(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1235년 이전 아일랜드에서 Margery FitzAnthony(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1268년 7월 23일 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 캘런에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 케리 트라리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John FitzThomas FitzGerald 1st Baron Desmond nasceu em 1195, em Shanid Castle, County Limerick, Irlanda, seu pai, Thomas FitzMaurice Lord of Connello, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Ellinor de Marisco, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery FitzAnthony antes 1235, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 23 de julho de 1268, em Callan, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Tralee, County Kerry, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John FitzThomas FitzGerald 1st Baron Desmond родился в 1195 г. в местности шанид кастл, коунти лимирикк, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Thomas FitzMaurice Lord of Connello было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellinor de Marisco, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery FitzAnthony перед 1235 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 23 июля 1268 г. в местности каллан, коунти килкенни, Ирландия в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности треили, коунти кирри, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John FitzThomas FitzGerald 1st Baron Desmond nació en 1195, en Shanid Castle, County Limerick, Irlanda, su papá, Thomas FitzMaurice Lord of Connello, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Ellinor de Marisco, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Margery FitzAnthony antes de 1235, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 23 de julio de 1268, en Callan, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Tralee, County Kerry, Irlanda.
